commit.message:
Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix tooltip clipping — render via portal with fixed positioning

Tooltips now render via createPortal to document.body with position:fixed,
so they escape any parent overflow:hidden containers. Coordinates are
calculated from the icon's bounding rect with smart edge clamping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: improve rate limits resilience with retry and longer cache

- Retry once on 429 (API returns retry-after: 0)
- Increase cache TTL from 60s to 5 minutes (rate limits change slowly)
- Add 30s cooldown after API failures to avoid hammering
- Extract helper functions for cleaner flow

The Anthropic usage API frequently returns 429 during active Claude Code
sessions. These changes ensure that once rate limit data is fetched
successfully, it remains visible for 5 minutes instead of being lost
after 60s and re-triggering a likely-to-fail API call.

commit.message:
Add MPS test suite (67 tests), CI job on macos-14, and fix related bugs (#3)

- Add 67 MPS backend tests covering tensor creation, ops, device transfer, nn modules, and autograd
- Enable CI with GitHub-hosted macos-14 M1 runner using dedicated requirements-test-mps.txt
- Fix five bugs uncovered by the new tests:
  - Add Tensor.mps() convenience method
  - Handle squeeze(dim=None) by calling view impl directly
  - Convert scalar exponent to tensor in pow backward
  - Fix MPS add/mul GPU dispatch to swap operands for correct broadcast shape
  - Fix pyobjc buffer_contents returning objc.varlist instead of raw pointer
- Add pyobjc-framework-Metal to MPS test deps for CI Metal detection

commit.message:
Bake completed strokes into persistent paint buffer for O(live_forms) perf

Forms shader now evaluates only in-progress stroke live; completed strokes
are baked into a ping-pong texture via copyTextureToTexture. K/S accumulator
seeds from baked pixel for subtractive inter-stroke mixing. Idle frames skip
compute dispatch entirely (baked→output copy). Global param changes and
undo/redo trigger one-time full rebake.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve DLC expiry page NaN/empty data + add comprehensive dashboard tests (285 tests)

- Backend: add getExpiryLotsDetailed() to lot-expiry.job.ts to fetch at-risk lots with value calculation
- Backend: add getExpiryStatsDetailed() to stock-dashboard.service.ts combining stats + detailed lots
- Backend: update stock-dashboard.controller.ts expiry endpoint to return { stats, summary, lots }
- Frontend: add 285 unit tests across 22 suites covering all dashboard pages, components, hooks, and utils

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(vpn): exclude local/DNS traffic from split-routing fwmark

uid 1000 DNS queries were being routed through wg0, failing because the
local DNS server (10.0.2.3) isn't reachable through the VPN tunnel.

Now excludes RFC1918, loopback, Tailscale CGNAT, and the system DNS
server from fwmark marking. Only external traffic gets routed through
the VPN.

commit.message:
feat: chat UI improvements — tree-style tools & Agent formatting (#35)

* feat: chat UI improvements — tree-style tools, Agent formatting, worktree toggle

CHAT-002: Major chat UI refinements

- Decompose SessionMessages.tsx (620→3 files): CodeRenderers, ToolItems, SessionMessages
- Tree-style tool groups: outer card with left-border tree line, label+badge format
  (Edit /path +N -M, Read /path N lines, Bash command, Agent description)
- Agent tool: dedicated renderer with system-line stripping (agentId, background notices)
- Read tool: show error/short result text inline, line count for code files
- Sticky TaskPlan bar: compact bottom status with expand toggle, i18n, empty guard
- Tool group "Show N more" / "Show less" toggle (default 3 visible)
- Thinking→tool-group description: deferred pendingThinking pattern (no more messages.pop())
- SearchToolItem: dedicated renderer for Grep/Glob tools
- Diff stats (+N -M) on Edit/Write tool items
- Worktree toggle: remove Enabled/Disabled text to save space
- Normalizer: add Agent tool content generation
- Lint: ulimit -c 0 to prevent biome coredump in project directory
- i18n: add showLess key (en/zh)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Opens file browser from the Changes panel header. When the issue

* fix: file browser supports absolute worktree paths via root query param

Backend validates root param against project directory or WORKTREE_BASE/<projectId>/
to allow browsing worktree directories. DiffPanel passes changesRoot when opening
the file browser so it opens the correct working directory.

* fix: preserve pendingThinking when TodoWrite and other tools are in same buffer

When a tool buffer contains both TodoWrite and non-todo tools, the thinking
description was lost because flushPendingThinking() cleared it before the
non-todo tool group could consume it.

commit.message:
Check proxy_fetch capability before using bridge for integrations

The old published extension doesn't have the TC_PROXY_FETCH handler,
so checking data-tc-bridge-loaded would break integrations for Web Store
users. Now listens for TC_EXTENSION_READY capabilities and only uses
the bridge proxy when proxy_fetch is advertised. Falls back to direct
fetch() for older extension versions and standalone mode.

commit.message:
Add HTTP-only mode for Caesars and Buckeye scrapers

The Render Free tier (512MB RAM) can't run Playwright browsers.
Both scrapers now support an `http_only=True` constructor parameter:

- Caesars: uses direct api.americanwagering.com API, skips Playwright
  fallback entirely. Zero browser overhead.
- Buckeye: authenticates via direct httpx POST instead of launching
  Playwright for Cloudflare cookies. Works if CF doesn't block the IP.

main.py auto-initializes HTTP-only versions when the Playwright versions
are disabled via DISABLED_SCRAPERS, adding 2 more sportsbooks (8 total)
with no additional RAM.

commit.message:
feat(arena): add disciplina-consistencia arena (136 messages)

32 seed + 26 RAG bonus conversations covering behavioral psychology:
- Habit loop (Duhigg/Lally 66-day research)
- Dopamine & motivation (Schultz reward prediction error)
- Self-Determination Theory (Deci & Ryan)
- Transtheoretical Model (Prochaska stages of change)
- Motivational Interviewing (Miller & Rollnick OARS)
- Environment Design (Wendy Wood friction theory)
- Temptation Bundling (Katy Milkman)
- Habit Stacking & Keystone Habits (BJ Fogg/Clear/Duhigg)
- Self-efficacy (Bandura), Relapse Prevention (Marlatt)
- Sleep-discipline connection, stress/cortisol, perfectionism
- Plateaus, identity construction, tracking metrics
- Social sabotage, aging adaptations, micro-habits, compound effect

commit.message:
Fix teacher edit 404 bug, remove teacher color, compact sidebar cards, fix multi-schedule conflict isolation

- Fix broken SQL in getTeacherWithSubjects ([id]/route.js) that joined non-existent schedule_options table, causing 404 on every teacher edit
- Remove per-teacher color picker; avatars now use fixed institutional navy (#1B2A4E)
- Fix NaN warning on max_hours input when field is cleared
- Add DB migration (runMigrations in horarios/page.jsx + /api/migrate) to fix UNIQUE constraint on schedule_assignments: old UNIQUE(section_id, slot_id, day) prevented assigning teachers to the same slot in different schedule options; new constraint is UNIQUE(option_id, section_id, slot_id, day)
- Compact teacher sidebar cards: smaller padding, avatar, fonts; remove percentage label and hours text from workload bar
